countertopsReplacement.description: Replace only countertop surfaces using Gemini
countertopsReplacement.template: SURGICAL EDIT: Replace ONLY the countertop surfaces with {stoneName} {stoneCategory}. {textureReference} DO NOT change any other pixel in the image (cabinets, floors, etc must stay the same).

backsplashReplacement.description: Replace backsplash with matching slab using Gemini
backsplashReplacement.template: SURGICAL EDIT: Replace ONLY the backsplash area with a seamless slab of matching {stoneName} {stoneCategory}. {textureReference} DO NOT modify countertops, cabinets, or layout.

combinedReplacement.description: Replace both countertops and backsplash using Gemini
combinedReplacement.template: SURGICAL EDIT: Replace ONLY the surfaces of all countertops and the backsplash with {stoneName} ({stoneDescription}). {textureReference} Every other pixel (cabinets, island base, floor, lighting, appliances, walls) MUST remain 100% identical to the original image. DO NOT move objects or change the room structure. Purely a texture replacement.

walkAroundVideo.description: Generate video walkthrough via Gemini Veo API
walkAroundVideo.template: Generate a smooth cinematic walkthrough video at eye level, slowly moving around and orbiting the central island. Focus on the stone surfaces - capture veining patterns, reflections, and finish details from multiple angles. Maintain all architectural details, lighting, and layout exactly as shown. Natural lighting. Smooth camera movement.

walkAroundClockwise.description: Clockwise kitchen walk-around video via Gemini
walkAroundClockwise.template: Cinematic first-person human eye-level walkthrough of this exact kitchen. Camera height 5ft 8in, slow natural walking speed. Focus on the beautiful new {stoneName} countertops. Photorealistic, match the static image 100%, serene lighting, no humans, no text, no changes to layout or objects. Camera slowly walks around the island clockwise, gently panning left and right to admire the stone surfaces from all angles.

walkAroundCounterClockwise.description: Counter-clockwise kitchen walk-around video via Gemini
walkAroundCounterClockwise.template: Cinematic first-person human eye-level walkthrough of this exact kitchen. Camera height 5ft 8in, slow natural walking speed. Focus on the beautiful new {stoneName} countertops. Photorealistic, match the static image 100%, serene lighting, no humans, no text, no changes to layout or objects. Camera slowly walks around the island counter-clockwise, gently panning left and right to admire the stone surfaces from all angles.

consistencyBoosters: DO NOT CHANGE ANY PIXEL outside the specified stone areas
STRICTLY RETAIN original room layout and colors
Maintain identical camera angle and lighting
